svg.title: Full document processing pipeline — step 1
svg.desc: Doctor documents are converted to images, classified by type, then processed through Pipeline A (OCR extraction) and Pipeline B (diploma visual check + stamp verification), before feeding into a web scraper agent

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What document formats are accepted as input — PDF only or images too?')
sendPrompt('What library should be used to convert PDFs to images — pdf2image?')
g.text: One image per page at high DPI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the file type classifier decide if a page is a diploma vs a job letter?')
g.text: Map each image → file type label

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which OCR engine should be used — Tesseract, Google Vision, or something else?')
g.text: Extract raw text from page image

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Should the JSON parser be a prompted LLM or a regex-based extractor?')
sendPrompt('What does the Pipeline A JSON record look like in full?')
sendPrompt('How does the diploma structure checker compare against reference templates?')
sendPrompt('How does the stamp OCR work — does it need a separate cropped region?')
g.text: Verify dean is real + in role

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What verdict fields does Pipeline B produce per diploma?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does the web scraper collect from university and hospital sites?')
g.text: Teacher / faculty names at the university
